description.value:
Jolistina's signature toy (Appendix 5; 100 gp → 10 gp). Martial thrown bomb, range 20 feet.

  • On impact, the square fills with roiling gray fog for 1 round (creatures inside are concealed).
  • The struck creature and every creature in or passing through the cloud: @Check[type:fortitude|dc:19] or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1} (on a critical failure, also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} for 1 round, retching). Poison effect.
  • Craft: @Check[type:crafting|dc:22] (alchemy; trained), 10 gp of reagents — these are purchasable, unlike fool's leprosy.

publication.title: Pathfinder: Curse of the Crimson Throne (PF2e conversion, private)
